title: 10 Herbal Creams For Adrenal Fatigue
description: Ginkgo biloba creams contains flavonoids and terpenoids, which are active constituents that help alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue. Flavonoids, such as quercetin and kaempferol, have anti-inflammatory properties that reduce oxidative stress and promote healthy cortisol production. Terpenoids, including bilobalide and ginkgolides, improve blood flow and oxygen delivery to the adrenal glands, enhancing their function and reducing fatigue.
